DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT LAURA RHODES' MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR COPY OF ITEMS OF ACCOUNT AND INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND ELECTRONICALLY STORED INFORMATION (SET ONE) FROM CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AS FOLLOWS: NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT RHODES' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) IS GRANTED. UNDER CCP 2030.290(A), PLAINTIFF HAS WAIVED ITS OBJECTIONS AND MUST PROVIDE RESPONSES NO LATER THAN 20 DAYS AFTER ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT RHODES' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION (SET ONE) GRANTED. PURSUANT TO CCP 2031.300, PLAINTIFF HAS WAIVED ITS OBJECTIONS AND MUST PROVIDE RESPONSES NO LATER THAN 20 DAYS AFTER ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PAY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $675 NO LATER THAN 30 DAYS AFTER ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER.) JUDGE PRO TEM: VEDICA PURI; CLERK: GINA GONZLAES; NOT REPORTED. (302)
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-01-2014 VACATED. DISMISSAL FILED 7/31/14. (206)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-01-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Compel Responses To Demand For Copy Of Items Of Account And Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Production Of Documents And Electronically Stored Information (Set One) From Cavalry Spv I, Llc, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT LAURA RHODES' Motion For Order To Compel Responses To Demand For Copy Of Items Of Account And Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Production Of Documents And Electronically Stored Information (Set One) From Cavalry Spv I, LLC, And For Monetary Sanctions as follows: No Opposition filed. Defendant Rhodes' Motion to Compel responses to Plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC Interrogatories (Set One) is GRANTED. Under CCP 2030.290(a), plaintiff has waived its objections and must provide responses no later than 20 days after entry of this order. Defendant Rhodes' Motion to Compel responses to Requests for Production (Set One) GRANTED. Pursuant to CCP 2031.300, plaintiff has waived its objections and must provide responses no later than 20 days after entry of this order. Plaintiff is ordered to pay sanctions in the amount of $675 no later than 30 days after entry of this order. (Prevailing party to prepare a proposed order.) Judge Pro Tem: Vedica Puri; Clerk: Gina Gonzlaes; Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Continued To Aug-06-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Continued To Jul-01-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT LAURA RHODES' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is granted. No opposition filed. (The Court will review the proposed order that was submitted by email prior to the hearing.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
